sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER, values ARRAY);
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, vector('a', 'b', 'c', 'a', 'd'));
UPDATE test_array SET values = ARRAY_APPEND(values, 'e') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT position('a', values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT position('b', values, 1, 1) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
